description_long: This convertible car features a sporty, aggressive design with a yellow body accented by bold black racing stripes running from the hood to the trunk. The car has a low, wide stance, flared wheel arches, and large, multi-spoke alloy wheels, giving it a performance-oriented appearance. The open-top cabin reveals two bucket seats with visible headrests and a detailed dashboard, while a prominent rear spoiler and dual exhausts emphasize its racing pedigree. Red trim lines accentuate the car's contours, adding a striking visual contrast to the yellow and black color scheme. The front fascia is characterized by a wide grille and angular headlights, while the rear showcases a clean, aerodynamic finish. The overall look is reminiscent of modern muscle or sports convertibles, designed for both speed and style in urban environments.
description: A yellow convertible sports car with black racing stripes, red trim, and a prominent rear spoiler. It features an open-top cabin, large alloy wheels, and a bold, performance-oriented design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, angular headlights, and bold black stripes on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open-top cabin, two bucket seats, and the car's low, wide profile with flared wheel arches.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual exhausts, rear spoiler, and continuation of the black stripes across the trunk.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cabin, wheel design, and aerodynamic lines.
